## Affiliated Societies

- **Border Orchid Society** (EC) — meets: 3rd Tue, 19h00
- **Cape Orchid Society** (WC) — meets: 2nd Tue, 19h30
- **East Rand Orchid Society** (GP) — meets: 2nd Sat, 14h00
- **Eastern Province Orchid Society** (EC) — meets: 1st Thu, 19h00
- **Free State Orchid Society** (FS) — meets: Last Sat, 14h30
- **Garden Route Orchid Society** (WC) — meets: 2nd Fri, 18h30
- **Highveld Orchid Society** (MP) — meets: 2nd Sun, 14h00
- **Kalahari Orchid Society** (NC) — meets: Last Thu, 18h30
- **Limpopo Orchid Society** (LP) — meets: 3rd Sat, 10h00
- **Lowveld Orchid Society** (MP) — meets: 1st Sat, 14h00
- **Midlands Orchid Society** (KZN) — meets: 2nd Mon, 19h00
- **Natal Orchid Society** (KZN) — meets: 1st Wed, 19h00
- **North Coast Orchid Society** (KZN) — meets: 1st Sun, 14h00
- **North West Orchid Society** (NW) — meets: 2nd Wed, 19h00
- **Northern Transvaal Orchid Society** (GP) — meets: Last Mon, 19h30
- **Overberg Orchid Society** (WC) — meets: 3rd Sat, 14h00
- **South Cape Orchid Society** (WC) — meets: 1st Wed, 18h00
- **Transvaal Orchid Society** (GP) — meets: 3rd Thu, 19h00
- **Vaal Triangle Orchid Society** (GP) — meets: Last Tue, 19h00
- **West Rand Orchid Society** (GP) — meets: 3rd Wed, 19h30
- **Winelands Orchid Society** (WC) — meets: Last Wed, 19h00

## National Show

**Past Shows:**

- 2024: National Show 18 (2024) — Durban ICC
- 2021: National Show 17 (2021) — Walter Sisulu NBG
- 2018: National Show 16 (2018) — Cape Town City Hall
- 2015: National Show 15 (2015) — NMBay Boardwalk
- 2012: National Show 14 (2012) — Bloemfontein Showgrounds

## Contact

---
## Scope Boundary
SAOC covers orchids in cultivation: growing, showing, hybridising, judging, community.
Wild orchid conservation and identification → WOSA (Wild Orchids of Southern Africa): wosa.org.za
